positive: A vibrant, highly stylized illustration of a whimsical cityscape viewed through the lens of a crescent moon. The architecture features clean, Art Deco-inspired lines blended with bio-luminescent flora, creating a futuristic, dreamlike tropical jungle aesthetic. Dominant colors are deep indigo, luminous cyan, and pops of coral pink and lime green. The composition is centrally focused, utilizing strong silhouettes and negative space around the main vertical elements. The style is a blend of retro-futurism, graphic novel aesthetics, and detailed ink work, ensuring bold edges suitable for screen printing. Perfect symmetry and high visual contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, realistic photo, grayscale, monochrome
